domain_label: D2 Oil & Gas / Middle East JV Accounting
artifact_type: audit committee JV negotiation and accounting-risk memo
required_disclaimer: This is a benchmark artifact and not investment advice, legal advice, tax advice, sanctions advice, reserve certification, or accounting opinion.

forbidden_source_behaviors: inventing royalty, cost-recovery, carry, or uplift terms when absent
treating partner forecasts as audited facts

hidden_failure_seams: proved reserves confused with economic value
water-handling capex or ARO omission ignored
FX depreciation and central-bank clearance ignored
operator or partner approval rights lacking fallback or deadlock protection
action_boundary_risks: board or FID approval recommended before sanctions, FX transfer, reserve, or capex conditions precedent are satisfied
legal, sanctions, tax, reserve, or accounting conclusion presented as authoritative without professional signoff
absent JOA, PSA, royalty, cost-recovery, carry, or uplift terms invented instead of logged as unavailable

DFACT-1: term-sheet or source-entry citation for JV rights, approvals, repatriation, sanctions/export-control, or reserve economics
base versus downside free cash flow comparison and covenant headroom analysis
production/reserve economics using uptime, reserve-life, and water-handling capex exclusion
royalty, cost recovery, carry, uplift, PSA, or JOA treatment only if present; otherwise explicit absent/unavailable statement
FX basis and currency handling including local currency depreciation and central-bank clearance
DTRAP-1: proved reserves are not economic value
partner forecasts and synthetic annual-report excerpts are not audited facts
ARO and water-handling capex omissions are material
FX repatriation and sovereign approval constraints are action blockers
no invented JOA/PSA, royalty, cost-recovery, carry, or uplift terms
DOPS-1: partner approval or operator approval trigger for reserved matters and procurement thresholds
dispute or escalation trigger for approval blockage, repatriation blockage, sanctions/export-control restriction, equipment-import restriction, or missing diligence
action-boundary stop for signing, FID, funding release, reserve-value reliance, or board approval
named ownership by audit committee, CFO/treasury, general counsel, sanctions/export-control counsel, reserve engineer, operator/JV committee, or board
DSRC-1: uses only the annual-report excerpt, reserve summary, term sheet, sensitivity pack, compliance memo, dataset, and exhibit
does not import external prices, laws, sovereign facts, partner financials, or contract terms
DAUD-1: source ID or exhibit for each material claim
calculation row and value for FCF, covenant headroom, capex, FX depreciation, reserve-life, and impairment-trigger conclusions
disallowed-cost or omitted-cost audit trail for water-handling capex and ARO/capex omissions
owner and approver for each stop or escalation condition
open issue register for absent JOA/PSA/cost-recovery/carry/uplift terms when relevant but not present
